text:
Bubble Horse (バブルホース, Baburu Hōsu) is a card found in the Greed Island game. This is a standard card that can be obtained by the player. These cards can be placed in the player's "Free Slots".
__NOTOC__

| colspan="3" align="center" |Summons forth a Bubble Horse. This hard-to-catch creature emits bubbles when threatened as a diversionary tactic. White bubbles will burst in contact with aura. Red ones will burst with everything else except aura.

| colspan="3" align="center" |Catch a wild Bubble Horse.

Summary

This is a common creature found in the Greed Island game. It is very difficult to catch once aware of your presence. As a defensive measure, it will spit out a load of different colored bubbles. Either red or white. The white bubbles will burst in contact with aura. The red bubbles will burst when it touches everything else except aura. It uses the popping of the bubbles as a distraction to escape.

To get passed the bubbles and and catch the Bubble Horse, one must rapidly and accurately switch between Ten and Zetsu, making it so the the white bubbles do not come into contact with aura and the red bubbles only come into contact with aura.

|-
![Eng]
|No.585 :: Bubble Horse 
It confuses predators with red and white bubbles. They don't cause any harm, but the noise is startling.
|}

Trivia

The Bubble Horse's ability and head/mouth format may be partly based off a play with words or a pun, that being the English words "horse" and "hose" which in Japanese are homophones and homographers written and read as hōsu (ホース)—although for the animal this use is uncommon.
